meaning: adj.斜的,斜纹的,对角线的n.对角线,斜纹织物
examples: The icon appears as two small squares that are in a diagonal.
The horse starts out in a straight line and then it hops off on a diagonal.
When taking diagonal falls, pay attention to the rope in relation to your feet.
By contrast, an iMac with a comparable 20-inch diagonal screen weighs in at just 20 pounds.
The Modbook Pro's crisp 13.3-inch (diagonal) display has a native 1280 by800 pixel resolution.
